title: Adult Choking Response
summary: Use when a person may have an airway blockage, cannot speak well, or shows the universal choking sign.

ask_if_the_person_can_cough_or_speak.speak_before: Ask the patient if they can cough or speak.
ask_if_the_person_can_cough_or_speak.agent_hint: This is the first quick screening question; keep it short.

if_they_cannot_breathe_or_speak_well_cal.speak_before: If they cannot breathe or cannot speak well, call emergency services now.
if_they_cannot_breathe_or_speak_well_cal.agent_hint: Make the escalation immediate if the airway sounds severely blocked.

encourage_coughing_if_they_can_still_cou.speak_before: If they can still cough forcefully, encourage them to keep coughing.

if_they_cannot_cough_or_speak_begin_chok.speak_before: If they cannot cough or speak, begin choking first aid according to your local training.
if_they_cannot_cough_or_speak_begin_chok.agent_hint: Stay procedural and do not invent unsupported medical details.

run_airway_or_mouth_obstruction_check_if.speak_before: If you can safely get a clear view, hold the camera on the mouth area for a moment.
run_airway_or_mouth_obstruction_check_if.agent_hint: Use a visual reasoning tool only if the mouth or airway area is visible enough. Otherwise say the view is unclear and ask for repositioning.
run_airway_or_mouth_obstruction_check_if.tool_prompt: Assess whether there appears to be a visible mouth or airway obstruction in the current view. Return whether an obstruction is visible, no clear obstruction is visible, or the view is too unclear to tell.
run_airway_or_mouth_obstruction_check_if.advance_when: the agent summarizes whether an obstruction is visible or the view is unclear

if_the_person_becomes_unresponsive_switc.speak_before: If the patient becomes unresponsive, switch immediately to CPR and AED guidance.
if_the_person_becomes_unresponsive_switc.agent_hint: Use this as the escalation branch out of the choking flow.
